name: Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken (Kfc)
recipeInstructions:
1. If you can't find Lipton's Tomato Soup, use Knorr's Tomato Basil Soup.
2. Mix together all the ingredients in a bowl.
3. Place some of the mixture in a plastic bag and shake to coat the chicken pieces evenly.
4. Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat.
5. Cook the coated chicken for 1 hour at 350°F (175°C), making sure to turn the heat off once done.
6. The chicken can also be prepared without skin.
